1717970.name: Chasing Tails ~A Promise in the Snow~ Artbook
1717970.description:
The colorful artworks of Chasing Tails ~A Promise in the Snow~, all in one place + exclusives!

Features

  • Art booklet with exclusive dev commentary. More updates coming soon!
  • A bunch of HUUUUGE MEGA KING SIZE print-friendly artwork. Did anyone say "yuri wallpapers"?
  • An even greater bunch of large pics to enjoy and/or use as a lovely background for your desktop
  • Various sketches
  • Special pics, including the spoopers!

You can find the artbook inside your Steam game folder.
1717970.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文, 俄语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 韩语
